# St. Xavier Timber

> Sri Lanka's longest-running industrial timber treatment facility. Established 1955. Kiln drying (timber seasoning), vacuum pressure impregnation (VPI), and ISPM 15 heat treatment. IPPC registered with the National Plant Quarantine Service of Sri Lanka.

## Key Facts

- Location: 1088, Colombo Road, Daluwakotuwa, Kochchikade, Sri Lanka (on the main Colombo–Negombo road, approximately 5 minutes south of Negombo town, about 40 minutes north of Colombo). NOT located in Moratuwa or anywhere else — one facility only, in Daluwakotuwa, Kochchikade.
- Established: 1955 (70+ years, four generations of family ownership)
- Phone: +94 31 227 7752 | WhatsApp: +94 71 471 1417
- Email: info@stxaviertimber.com
- Website: https://www.stxaviertimber.com
- Coverage: island-wide — customers across all 25 districts of Sri Lanka send timber for treatment; delivery available both ways
- Sister company: CeyPall (https://ceypall.com) — ISPM 15 certified wooden pallet manufacturing

## Services

1. **Kiln Drying / Timber Seasoning** — automated kiln chambers drying timber to a verified 12–15% moisture content. Species include rubberwood, teak, mahogany, pine, jak, kumbuk, nadun, coconut, and imported hardwoods. Drying time 3–12 days depending on species and thickness. Moisture verified with calibrated meters, recorded per batch.
2. **Vacuum Pressure Impregnation (VPI)** — 5% borate preservative solution (Boron Borax) driven deep into the timber at 10 bar (145 PSI), with retention verified per species and dimension. Protects against termites, wood borers, and fungal decay. 10-year warranty against pest contamination. Non-toxic: no heavy metals, arsenic, or solvents.
3. **ISPM 15 Heat Treatment** — IPPC registered heat treatment for export wooden packaging (pallets, crates, dunnage). Core heated to 56°C for minimum 30 minutes. Issues the IPPC certification mark and per-batch treatment certificate. Accepted in 180+ countries.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.stxaviertimber.com): services overview, process, contact
- [Service Areas](https://www.stxaviertimber.com/service-areas): island-wide coverage hub
- [Treatment Calculator](https://www.stxaviertimber.com/calculator): instant volume, drying time, and treatment estimates
- [Knowledge Centre](https://www.stxaviertimber.com/blog): 60+ guides on timber seasoning, kiln drying, VPI, species, and defects
- [Case Studies](https://www.stxaviertimber.com/case-studies): documented treatment outcomes
